recommendations.overview: Kate and Matt discover that a part of their house can grant wishes. In the wake of two miscarriages, what they want most is a child.

recommendations.title: Switched for Christmas
recommendations.overview: Identical twins Kate and Chris Lockhart plot to be the other sister – at Kate’s office and Chris’ school – and take on planning their sister’s Christmas events. One rule, though: no romance.

recommendations.title: House at the End of the Street
recommendations.overview: A mother and daughter move to a new town and find themselves living next door to a house where a young girl murdered her parents. When the daughter befriends the surviving son, she learns the story is far from over.

recommendations.title: The Clinic
recommendations.overview: While traveling across country with her fiancé, Beth wakes alone in an isolated clinic to a mother's worst nightmare. Just how far will she go to save her child?

recommendations.overview: Phil and Kate select the winsome young Camilla as a live-in nanny for their newborn child, but the seemingly lovely Camilla is not what she appears to be...
